description: Temporary test layout: 4 TS4231 sensors on a 12.5 cm square, drone held vertical with head/front down. Origin is the drone center.
orientation_note: Room convention for this test: x is right/left, z is up/down, y is zero because the sensor square is held in a vertical plane. Sensors 1 and 2 are bottom, sensors 0 and 3 are top.

sensors.corner: rear right, top in this vertical test
front right, bottom in this vertical test
front left, bottom in this vertical test
rear left, top in this vertical test
